target: 1. Ryunosuke Nagumo Returns to Hitogashima Island
July 22
Hizuru Minakata
Phew...
(This is bad. This time it's really bad...)
(My pen has stopped before, but it's nothing compared to this.)
(No matter how much I think, my thoughts just go in circles. It's a massive slump...)
(I don't even know where I should start anymore.)
(I decided to return home for the first time in years, grasping at straws... But is there anything to be gained from that small island at this point?)
(If anything, changing my environment might just mess up my thoughts even more!?)
(In the first place, returning home just because I'm stuck is far too simplistic!!)
(This is no good! I'm ashamed of myself for letting my thinking become so rigid!!)
(Maybe I should turn back--)
(No, I've already contacted Ryunosuke. If I say I'm not going now, he'll just make a huge fuss asking why.)
(...Just imagining it is an extremely troublesome situation.)
(Good grief. I'd like to yell at my past self from a few days ago for making such an easy decision.)
(Well, whatever. If I consider it as research for my next work, it won't be a waste.)
(No, I can't let it be a waste. Getting out of this slump is an urgent matter.)
(I will definitely grasp an idea for my next work on this trip home. Something that will completely blow away the fact that I made such an easy decision...)
We will soon be arriving in Hitogashima.
(We're here already? That was fast.)
(I don't have any deep emotions about returning, but it's not a bad sight no matter how many times I see it...)
Thank you for sailing with us. Please watch your step as you disembark.
Ugh... This suitcase is heavy...
That Ryunosuke... As soon as he found out I was coming back, he demanded a massive amount of souvenirs...
He should try putting himself in the shoes of the one carrying them. Good grief...
Hm?
(That boy from earlier. He's just standing there blankly...)
(He's dumbfounded? Is there something in his line of sight that's captivating him that much?)
(At the very least, all I can see is the boringly peaceful scenery of the island.)
(He really is a strange boy. First earlier, and now--)
Ushio!!
(What is with this guy... What is the meaning of this action? Is his goal to suffocate by burying his face in my chest? How original!)
(He seemed to be yelling "Ushio", but how is that related to this action--)
N-Nagumo-sensei!?
I... I'm alive...!!
What...?
(Given that he spoke with his face buried in my chest, he couldn't have been looking at anyone else when he called out.)
(That means he was calling me Nagumo-sensei. ...That's impossible, why?)
Boy... You and I should be meeting for the first time, though...?
Huh...?
B-But! Hizuru-san, you're Nagumo Ryunosuke-sensei... aren't you...!?
Wha...!
Why... do you know my true identity!?
(That boy knows that I am "Ryunosuke Nagumo". But I have never met him before.)
(I haven't made my identity public at all, you know? If the information leaked... was Ryunosuke the source?)
(What perfect timing.)
Hello?
Ah, Sis?
What is with that confirmation? Who did you think you were calling?
You, of course. Huh? Are you in a bad mood or something?
If that's what you think, then you should interpret it that way and act accordingly.
Yeah, yeah.
You're already at the port, right? Sorry, I was planning to go meet you, but I ended up leaving the house late.
Huh?
Wait for about 5 more minutes, okay? Alright, see you in a bit.
(You should have known what time the ferry was arriving! Why are you running late!!)
(And I didn't even ask you to come meet me! So why do I have to wait here for you!?)
...This is unreasonable.
(...Hm? Where did that boy go?)
(From the looks of it, he seemed to be a resident of this island too. I wonder if we'll end up running into each other somewhere eventually.)
(It does bother me how he found out my true identity, though...)
(For now, I should prioritize my next work. If I don't break out of this slump--)
(Before I can even think about how to be a writer, I'll lose sight of myself as a writer...!)
